string.text:
Improves sneak ambush dodge (+3%% per level, 25%% base, 85%% cap), PDA sneak speed (+2%% per level), and ambush drop distance (+1 m per level).
 
Levels are gained by dodging threats during sneak travel and completing sneak journeys.
$clr_green* $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whitePDA travel speed increased\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased
$clr_green* $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whitePDA travel speed increased\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased
